name: Ecca Vandal
description: '''Ecca Vandal''' is a South African-born [[alternative rock]] singer, songwriter and rapper based in [[Melbourne]], Australia. Vandal's first album, ''[[Ecca Vandal (album)|Ecca Vandal]]'', was released in 2017, and her second, ''Looking for People to Unfollow'',  was released on 22 May 2026.
